Uses of Class
org.bukkit.enchantments.EnchantmentTarget

  • Packages that use EnchantmentTarget 
    Package Description
    org.bukkit.enchantments
    Classes relating to the specialized enhancements to item stacks, as part of the meta data.

    • Uses of EnchantmentTarget in org.bukkit.enchantments

      Methods in org.bukkit.enchantments that return EnchantmentTarget 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      abstract EnchantmentTarget Enchantment.getItemTarget()
      Gets the type of ItemStack that may fit this Enchantment.
      EnchantmentTarget EnchantmentWrapper.getItemTarget()  
      static EnchantmentTarget EnchantmentTarget.valueOf​(java.lang.String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static EnchantmentTarget[] EnchantmentTarget.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
